prose:
**Acrolein Fukui Reactivity** — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier `standard`, exact integrals) in PySCF (via chemkit), gas phase (no solvent), charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz` (.xyz), no geometry optimization (single‐point fukui). Implicit gas phase only. SCF converged cleanly for neutral, cation, and anion states. Mulliken partial charges used to compute condensed Fukui functions.

Most electrophilic site: C atom 4 (index 3) with f⁺ = 0.64232102
Most nucleophilic site: O atom 1 (index 0) with f⁻ = 0.39388616

Command run:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui   /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz   --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1   --stdout json --out fukui_acrolein_standard.json
```
Output JSON: `fukui_acrolein_standard.json`
No warnings reported
